name: starstream-run-web
description: Run Starstream contracts in the browser via wasmtime's Pulley interpreter.

scripts.build:wrpc: rm -rf web/vendor/wrpc && mkdir -p web/vendor/wrpc && cp -RL node_modules/@bytecodealliance/wrpc/src/. web/vendor/wrpc/
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:bindgen && pnpm run build:score && pnpm run build:wrpc
scripts.start: pnpm run build && pnpm run serve
